rules.title: Three conditions are required to catch all overlapping claims
rules.body: When identifying claims that are concurrent with an event of interest, capture any claim whose date range overlaps OR encompasses the event dates — not just claims that start within the event window.

wrong.label: Incorrect — too narrow, misses spanning claims

callout.title: Example
callout.body: Event: Jan 15 – Jan 15. Concurrent facility claim: Jan 14 – Jan 16. The correct logic catches this; the incorrect logic misses it because the claim starts before the event.

subsections.title: Include Medicare FFS in Concurrent Claims Pulls

rules.title: Always include Medicare FFS alongside APCD claims
rules.body: When pulling concurrent claims to find unassigned events that might have a facility claim, always include Medicare FFS claims in addition to commercial/Medicaid APCD claims. Missing FFS concurrent claims means some assignable events go unmatched.
